_meta.session: BMT batch 1 — Priority 7 Audio. Opens a new 'audio' category. Tracked frontier text models have no published MMAU/AudioBench scores; coverage exists only for older Gemini (1.5/2.0/2.5) + audio-specialist models (Kimi-Audio, Qwen2.5-Omni, Audio Flamingo 3). MMAU-Pro adds some 2025 coverage (Gemini 2.5 Flash 59.2%). Two benchmarks registered to open the audio category for future ingestion.

benchmarks.name: AudioBench
benchmarks.description: NUS AudioLLMs: 26 sub-tasks across speech recognition, scene understanding, paralinguistic analysis.

benchmarks.name: MMAU
benchmarks.description: 10,000 audio-language QA pairs across music/speech/sound. Human baseline ~78%. Evaluation moved to HuggingFace Space 2026-01-30.
